title: isNumeric leads to internal error
description:
Query:
SELECT ?CH WHERE
{
BIND (3 AS ?CH)
FILTER(isNumeric(?CH))
}

Leads to error:
Virtuoso 37000 Error SP031: SPARQL: Internal error: ssg_print_builtin_expn(): bad native type for isNUMERIC()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_numeric (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_numeric (id, value) VALUES (1, '3'), (2, 'abc'), (3, NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_numeric WHERE id = 1 AND isNumeric(value);
SELECT value FROM test_numeric WHERE id = 2 AND isNumeric(value);
SELECT value FROM test_numeric WHERE id IS NULL OR isNumeric(value);
